creator: vidwer@gmail.com
text:
Installing GDB from ports stalls at the step "checking whether compiler driver understands Ada...".
Running 'make -dx install' in its directory reveals the following top output (note that this is not all of it):

How-To-Repeat: make install clean -C devel/gdb
